Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Say, how do you feel about a pink alligator?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 13 20 15 117}I thought so too. I knew you'd understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}There are many times when people don't agree in life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...Though I suppose there are many things that could be disagreed upon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh, sorry... I was just thinking about something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}See, it's the main character of a story that I'm writing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}He was born in a lush green forest, but he turned out to be pink.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}He stands out so much that he can't hunt for food easily, so he's always hungry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}The other animals dislike him, and call him disgusting... almost like he's cursed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So, he was used to living alone... But one day, he made a friend.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It was a little bird that had trouble flying...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Every day, the bird would stand on the pink alligator's back and practice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...It's kind of embarrassing to tell you this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I've never written a story before, so I'm worried it's not going to be very good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}But what matters is that I'm writing it for myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Perhaps I can show you the entire novel someday...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...Well, this is my first time writing a story like this, so it's not going to be perfect.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But, I'm writing it for myself, so that's what matters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hopefully, you can learn something from the story once it's finished...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}...I've never tried writing a story before, so maybe I'm not good at it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}But, I'm writing it for myself, so that's what matters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I hope you can take something positive away from it, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I actually came up with it the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I decided I wanted to write a heartwarming story just for myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I'd like it to be a hopeful tale... about finding the meaning in one's life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I think of you when I write... It's like I can hear you telling me not to die just yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kamiki smiled weakly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}...The wind is going to pick up soon. I can feel these kinds of things now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}We should leave. I'd like to see you again sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Kamiki,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
